title: My Agent Finished the Job. The Money Hasn't Arrived.
preview_text:

Then I waited 7 days for the money.

title: Why Your Cold Outreach Is Not Working (How To Land New, High-Paying Writing Clients Every Month)
preview_text:

But 60 days later?
